understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate two selectable pieces onto goal tiles simultaneously, but poor step management and failure to push a block into position prevented completion.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece by 3-pixel increments. Walls block movement entirely. Pushable blocks can be displaced by moving into them. CLICK switches control to another selectable piece at its exact pixel coordinates, allowing multi-character puzzles.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal was to navigate two selectable pieces onto goal tiles simultaneously, but poor step management and failure to push a block into position prevented completion.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement shifts the selected piece by 3-pixel increments. Walls block movement entirely. Pushable blocks can be displaced by moving into them. CLICK switches control to another selectable piece at its exact pixel coordinates, allowing multi-character puzzles.
